allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
aionui: Update manifest to v1.8.1 with proper NSIS installer extraction

- Fix hash format \(add sha256: prefix\)
- Update license to Apache-2.0
- Add installer script to extract from NSIS setup
- Add post_install cleanup
- Fix checkver format for autoupdate
- Add #/dl.7z suffix for proper extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
